name: GaugeFlow P5-D0.1 fixed-batch unconditional coordinate-flow overfit audit v1
purpose: Determine whether the unchanged P5-D0 unconditional coordinate field can memorize a finite, fixed set of torus flow tangents for one endpoint. This is an audit of the model/loss/substrate, not a new conditional experiment.

state.endpoint_source: P5-D0 / P5 v1 endpoint index 0; same atom types, lattice, coordinate target, and torus path

attribution_reference.rule: These fixed references classify a successful fixed-batch fit; they do not convert this audit into a P5-D1 authorization.

decision_rule: Fixed-batch overfit passes only if both pass_criteria hold after exactly 5,000 updates. If it fails, attribute to model/loss inability to memorize. If it passes but unseen teacher-forced RMS exceeds its reference, attribute to source-coupling generalization. If both teacher-forced sets pass but free-running RMS exceeds its reference, attribute to integration trajectory. This audit never authorizes P5-D1, P3, P4, P6, an oracle, real tensor training, relaxation, DFT, or DFPT.
